solana-wallet-age-activity.title: Solana Wallet Age & Activity
solana-wallet-age-activity.description: Use `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{wallet}/transactions_v3/?page-size=1&sort=asc` to find the wallet's first-ever transaction (creation date), then the summary endpoint for total tx count and unique programs interacted with. Returns: first tx date, total lifetime transaction count, top 5 most-called programs, and days since last activity — foundational data for Solana wallet scoring, sybil detection, onchain identity badges, and airdrop eligibility checks.
solana-wallet-age-activity.useCase: Build a Solana wallet age and activity scorer for sybil detection, airdrop eligibility checks, and onchain identity badges using first transaction date and lifetime interaction data.

keyParams.address: The Solana wallet address to analyze for age and activity signals
keyParams.page_size: Use 1 with ascending sort to find the first-ever transaction efficiently
keyParams.block_signed_at_asc: Set to true to retrieve the oldest transaction for wallet age calculation

solana-wallet-balances.title: Solana Wallet Balances
solana-wallet-balances.description: Call `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{wallet}/balances_v2/` with your GoldRush API key to retrieve every SPL token held — including name, symbol, logo URI, raw balance, decimals, current USD price, and total USD value per token. Handles associated token accounts (ATAs) automatically with no manual derivation. Add `nft=false` to filter out NFTs and return pure fungible token holdings. Build a full Solana portfolio UI in under 50 lines of TypeScript.
solana-wallet-balances.useCase: Build a full Solana portfolio UI that lists every SPL token with its USD value and logo, automatically handling all associated token accounts, in under 50 lines of TypeScript.

keyParams.address: The Solana wallet address to retrieve token balances for
keyParams.nft: Set to false to exclude NFTs and return only fungible token holdings
keyParams.no_spam: Set to true to filter out spam or dust token accounts

solana-yield-dashboard.title: Solana Yield Dashboard
solana-yield-dashboard.description: Aggregate current APY/APR data across the top Solana yield venues using GoldRush: Marinade Finance (native staking 6–7% + liquid mSOL), Orca (CLMM fee APY by pool), Kamino (lending supply/borrow rates), Drift (perpetuals funding rates), and Jito (MEV-boosted staking). Returns a unified yield comparison object sortable by APY, protocol, or risk level — use as the data backbone for an autonomous yield-rebalancing agent or a user-facing 'where should I put my SOL?' comparison UI.
solana-yield-dashboard.useCase: Build a Solana yield comparison dashboard that ranks staking and DeFi APY opportunities across Marinade, Jito, Orca, and Kamino to power an autonomous yield-rebalancing agent.

keyParams.address: Wallet address to check current yield positions and liquid staking token holdings
keyParams.nft: Set to false to focus on fungible token balances only
keyParams.no_spam: Set to true to exclude spam tokens from the balance response

spl-token-metadata.title: SPL Token Metadata
spl-token-metadata.description: Call `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/tokens/{mint}/` with any SPL token mint address to retrieve: token name, symbol, decimals, total supply, logo URI, and current USD price as indexed by GoldRush. Works for any SPL token including newly launched pump.fun tokens, wrapped assets, and DeFi governance tokens. This is the mandatory first call for any Solana token analytics page — gives your app complete token context from a single endpoint.
spl-token-metadata.useCase: Build a Solana token analytics page that loads complete token context — name, symbol, supply, logo, and current price — from a single GoldRush endpoint call.

keyParams.contractAddresses: The SPL token mint address to fetch metadata and current price for
keyParams.tokenAddress: The SPL token mint address to fetch holder count and total supply for
keyParams.page_size: Set to 1 to efficiently retrieve metadata alongside total holder count
